title: Flatcar Linux: A Modern OS for the Always-On Infrastructure

resources.title: Flatcar Getting Started documentation
resources.evidence_quote: Well, I guess reading the getting started documentation would be a great entry point.

resources.title: Flatcar SysEx Bakery
resources.evidence_quote: And these we maintain these SIS Xs in the thing we call the SIS X bakery, where we have a whole collection of these.

resources.title: Flatcar Linux update operator
resources.evidence_quote: There's also a reboot operator that we maintain ourselves, the FlatKal Linux update operator.

resources.title: libguestfs tools
resources.evidence_quote: Maybe not that obscure, but I use the GuestFS tools quite a lot, like GuestMount for mounting disk images or GuestFish for poking about in the minutes of shell like interface.
